data.description:
## What

Land the Dependabot github-actions group bump (GitHub PR #119) through Gerrit. Bumps 8 actions to new major versions across `.github/workflows/*.yml`:

- `actions/checkout` → v7
- `actions/setup-python` → v6
- `github/codeql-action` (init + analyze) → v4
- `actions/upload-artifact` → v7
- `actions/cache` → v6
- `actions/download-artifact` → v8
- `aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials` → v6
- `hashicorp/setup-terraform` → v4

## Why

Keep CI action deps current (Node 20→24 runtime cutover; GitHub forces Node 24 on runners 2026-06-02 and removes Node 20 2026-09-16). GitHub PRs can't merge here (ruleset); the bump must land via Gerrit.

## Scope

Only `.github/workflows/*.yml`. No source/test changes. Validity vetted: all 8 target versions exist; 7 are clean runtime bumps with no input/default changes touching our usage. The one risk — `actions/checkout` v6 moved `persist-credentials` creds to `$RUNNER_TEMP`, which briefly broke linked-worktree pushes (reconcile-bridge) in v6.0.0 — is fixed in v6.0.1+/v7 via a `worktrees/*` includeIf, and the PR pins the floating `@v7` tag, so it carries the fix.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 8 actions reference their target major versions across the 12 affected workflow files (checkout@v7, setup-python@v6, codeql-action@v4, upload-artifact@v7, cache@v6, download-artifact@v8, configure-aws-credentials@v6, setup-terraform@v4)
- [ ] The 12 changed workflow YAML files still parse as valid YAML
- [ ] No files outside `.github/workflows/` are modified by this change
- [ ] [operator-attested] The change passes CI on Gerrit (Verified +1) and lands on main
data.title: Bump 8 GitHub Actions to new majors (Dependabot PR #119)
